title: Tangy Fluffy Dutch Chickpea Pancakes
description: A nostalgic Dutch-inspired pancake that's tangy, fluffy, and highprotein, made from chickpea flour and a quick fermented batter.
instructions: In a bowl, combine the chickpea flour, sea salt, and yeast.
Add the warm water gradually, whisking until a smooth batter forms with no lumps.
Stir in the apple cider vinegar and lemon zest until fully incorporated.
Cover the bowl with a damp cloth and let the batter ferment at room temperature for 30 minutes; it will bubble slightly.
Heat a non‑stick skillet over medium heat and brush with a little olive oil.
Pour 1/4 cup of batter onto the skillet for each pancake, spreading gently with a spatula to form circles about 6–8 cm in diameter.
Cook 2–3 minutes until bubbles form on the surface and the edges lift, then flip and cook another 2 minutes until golden and fluffy.
Serve warm drizzled with maple syrup, with a splash of lemon juice or a dollop of yogurt if desired.
